# Metro Auto Detailing

> Fully mobile auto detailing in Bakersfield, CA. We come to you — home, office, or anywhere your car is parked.

## Business

- Name: Metro Auto Detailing
- Phone: (661) 368-5165
- Email: metrodetailing661@gmail.com
- Website: https://metroautodetailing.pro
- Service area: Bakersfield, CA and surrounding areas within 15 miles
- Available: Monday–Sunday, 8am–8pm
- Booking: By appointment only. No walk-ins. No fixed location.

## Services

### Signature Wash — $80 / $100 (larger vehicles)
Hand wash, clay bar, tire and wheel cleaning, exterior glass, dress tires and trim, spray wax or sealant.

### Exterior Detail — $150 / $170
Everything in the Signature Wash plus iron decontamination, paint decontamination, and a ceramic spray sealant for longer-lasting protection.

### Interior Detail — $200 / $240
Full interior vacuum, all surfaces wiped and treated, glass cleaned, carpet spot treatment, odor treatment, air vents cleaned.

### Refresh Detail — $250 / $290
Interior detail plus exterior wash and spray sealant. Full refresh inside and out.

### Full Detail — $400 / $440
Complete interior and exterior service. Everything in the Exterior and Interior packages combined.

## Add-Ons

- Headlight Restoration: $80
- Water Spot Removal: $100
- Trim Restoration: $100
- Pet Hair & Sand Removal: $80
- Carpet & Seat Extraction: $70
- Engine Bay Detail: $50
- Leather Conditioning: $40

## Fleet Pricing

- Exterior Wash: $7/ft
- Roof Wash: +$3/ft
- Interior Detail: +$4/ft
- Wash & Wax: $10/ft

## Common Questions

**What do I need to provide?**
Nothing. We bring water, generator, all equipment and products.

**Do I need to be home?**
No. Just leave the car accessible and keys available.

**What areas do you serve?**
Bakersfield, CA and surrounding areas within 15 miles. Southwest Bakersfield, Stockdale, Seven Oaks, Terra Vista, Rosedale, and nearby communities.

**How long does a detail take?**
Signature Wash: ~1 hour. Full Detail: 4-6+ hours. Exact time depends on vehicle condition.

**What payment methods do you accept?**
All major credit/debit cards, cash, Zelle, Apple Pay.

**Is a deposit required?**
Yes. $20 deposit secures the appointment. Applied toward the total. Refundable with enough notice.
